name: cra-ai-assistant
description: CRA AI Assistant - Clinical Research Assistant Desktop Application

scripts.start: concurrently -k "webpack serve --config webpack.renderer.config.js --mode development" "webpack --config webpack.main.config.js --mode development && wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron dist/main/index.js"
scripts.build: webpack --config webpack.main.config.js --mode production && webpack --config webpack.renderer.config.js --mode production
scripts.dev: concurrently "webpack --config webpack.main.config.js --mode development --watch" "webpack serve --config webpack.renderer.config.js --mode development"
